name: File Decode or Download followed by Suspicious Activity
notes: This rule triggers when a file decode or download occurred followed by a suspicious activity. It can be when utilities such as certutil is used to decode a file. This could indicate a malicious user downloading an encoded file and decoding the file to evade security.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Endpoint Activities match at least 1 times in 2 minutes after any of BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events
BB:CategoryDefinition: File Decode by a Utility
BB:CategoryDefinition: File Decode by a Utility match with the same Machine Identifier (custom)
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Endpoint Activities match at least 1 times in 2 minutes after any of BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events, BB:BehaviorDefinition: PowerShell File Download Activity, BB:CategoryDefinition: File Decode by a Utility match with the same Machine Identifier (custom)
thresholds: when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Endpoint Activities match at least 1 times in 2 minutes after any of BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events, BB:BehaviorDefinition: PowerShell File Download Activity, BB:CategoryDefinition: File Decode by a Utility match with the same Machine Identifier (custom)
TD_list: APPLY File Decode or Download followed by Suspicious Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

AND when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Endpoint Activities match at least 1 times in 2 minutes after any of BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events, BB:BehaviorDefinition: PowerShell File Download Activity, BB:CategoryDefinition: File Decode by a Utility match with the same Machine Identifier (custom)
RED_list: Event name: File Decode or Download followed by Suspicious Activity
Event description: Detects when utilities such as certutil is used to decode a file. This could indicate a malicious user downloading an encoded file and decoding the file to evade security.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
